options.name: <fileName>
options.description: Specifies the name of the file in which the partition pin assignment information will be saved.

options.name: -all
options.description: Specifies that pin assignment information will be saved for all partitions, including the top-level design.

options.name: -design
options.description: Specifies that pin assignment information will be saved only for the top-level design.

options.name: -ptn
options.description: Specifies name of the partition for which the pin assignment information is to be saved

options.name: -selected
options.description: Specifies that pin assignment information will be saved for all the selected pins of partitions, including the top-level design.
